title: The Growth-and-Give Cycle
subtitle: A visualisation for picturing the next level of abundance and the generosity it makes possible, as a single connected loop
excerpt: A short visualisation from the Day 83 theme of a 12-week money programme. The image is a cycle: growth that funds giving, and giving that sustains the drive to grow. The practice grounds the commitment to expand in something larger than ambition.
sourceNotes: Original visualisation created for homemade.education, drawing on the Day 83 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).

practice.whenToUse: Use before committing to a new financial goal, to anchor the why behind the growth in generosity rather than just a number.

content.text: A short visualisation for the Day 83 theme: commit to continued growth and giving. The image is a loop in which each expansion makes more generosity possible, and the generosity gives the growth its reason.
Sit comfortably. Close your eyes or let your gaze soften.
Picture yourself at the next level. Not the peak — just the next one. A little more income. A little more ease. A slightly bigger life.
Now see what that level makes possible. A person you can support. A cause you can fund. Time you can give. Something that was just out of reach from here becomes straightforward from there.
Notice that the giving is not a reward that comes after the growth. It is what makes the growth feel worth having. The two are not separate. They turn together.
Hold the image of that loop: growth that gives, and giving that sustains the reason to grow.
Open your eyes when you are ready.
Original to homemade.education. Draws on the Day 83 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
